Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 4 0 0}It seems we truly do have one final battle ahead of us.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 5 0 0}Let's make sure we're as prepared as possible before proceeding.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 9 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 7 0 0}We'll get to the bottom of this no matter what stands in our way.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A new path in the Desert of Doors[n]will lead us to the final battle...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The answers we seek lie just beyond it.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}We should take all possible measures to[n]prepare before going through the door.[n]{f 1 1}
